findings.description: The source file's introduction section contains substantive descriptions of 5 components that are not captured in the knowledge file. Each component description provides meaningful architectural context beyond mere navigation: (1) jsp_page_templates — JSP tag files and include files for common areas excluding business function area, implementing UI標準; (2) jsp_widgets — JSP tag files for UI components (buttons, search result tables, input fields); (3) css_framework — common style definitions providing unified appearance, and dynamic display adjustment based on device size (デバイスサイズに応じた動的な表示調整); (4) js_framework — JavaScript components for UI features not achievable with standard HTML; (5) inbrowser_jsp_rendering — mechanism to open local disk JSP files directly in browser, enabling easy preview of screen images and operation demos during design. The device-size responsive behavior of css_framework and the local-preview capability of inbrowser_jsp_rendering are particularly significant architectural details not present in any section of the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence:
本節では業務機能JSPから使用する以下の各機能の構造について述べる。
:doc:`jsp_page_templates` — 業務画面の内容のうち、業務機能領域を除く各共通領域の描画やHTMLヘッダ等...
:doc:`css_framework` — デバイスサイズに応じた動的な表示調整を行う。
:doc:`inbrowser_jsp_rendering` — これにより設計中の画面のイメージや動作デモを簡単に確認することができる。
